current.summary: Completed full develop workflow for _gencapabilities pipeline: design doc, implementation plan, validation (3 attempts), 5 beads created, Phase B analysis done — ready to execute

activeWork.description: Execute the 5 beads for the _gencapabilities Go command: T1 types, T2 tests (RED), T3 implementation (GREEN), T4 release.yml integration, Final validation
activeWork.progress: Brainstorm (design doc created from handoff context), plan written (4 tasks), quality review passed, validation passed in 3 attempts (fixed: canonical-keys.yaml scope clarified in design doc, missing strings import, wrong default path, T2 RED state misleading wording, T4 diff count, missing make fmt in final bead). 5 beads created with dependencies wired. Phase B analysis complete (5 issues caught + fixed pre-execution). .develop/syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline.json is at execute stage.

recentDecisions: Phase 1 scope: _gencapabilities reads only docs/provider-formats/*.yaml — canonical-keys.yaml is Phase 2 scope (used by sync-capabilities.ts in syllago-docs for per-key data files)
Field filtering: separate Go input structs (includes confidence, graduation_candidate, etc.) from output structs (excludes them) — makes filtering automatic and impossible to bypass
Default path: filepath.Join("..", "docs", "provider-formats") — 1 level up from cli/, which is where the binary runs in release.yml
T2 RED failure mode: compile error (undefined: capabilitiesProviderFormatsDir) not runtime test failure — go build passes, go test fails to compile
Empty slices: use make([]T, 0) not nil to ensure [] not null in JSON output
Phases 2-5 (syllago-docs sync + Astro collections + components + pages) are a separate /develop feature in the syllago-docs repo
nextSteps: Run /develop to enter execute mode: `bd update syllago-h7zg0 --status=in_progress` then work through T1→T2→T3→T4→Final
T1 (syllago-h7zg0): Create cli/cmd/syllago/gencapabilities.go with all Go types and empty runGencapabilities stub — see plan Task T1 for complete code
T2 (syllago-2y8wt): Write 22 failing tests in cli/cmd/syllago/gencapabilities_test.go — tests fail with compile error (capabilitiesProviderFormatsDir undefined), not runtime failure
T3 (syllago-eqftp): Implement runGencapabilities, loadProviderFormatsDir, buildCapEntry to make all 22 tests pass — default path is filepath.Join("..", "docs", "provider-formats")
T4 (syllago-16gau): Add _gencapabilities to .github/workflows/release.yml — exactly +5/-4 net diff, run make fmt after
Final (syllago-0ulkj): make build + go test + make fmt + json.tool validation + forbidden field check
After Phase 1 complete: create /develop feature in syllago-docs repo for Phases 2-5 (sync-capabilities.ts, Astro collections, components, pages)

context.notes: Bead chain: syllago-h7zg0 → syllago-2y8wt → syllago-eqftp → syllago-16gau → syllago-0ulkj. All 5 beads are in .beads/issues.jsonl.
